name: BackyarDEV's IPA Repo
subtitle: A source for ApolloICA App
description: This is a AltStore source for ApolloICA

versions.localizedDescription:
This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 2.1.0 patched with Liquid Glass support.

- Add Steam store deep linking support (thanks @wdeezy for the contribution!) (#110)
    - To enable, toggle "Open Steam Links in App" in Custom API > General
- Update default recently read posts limit to be unlimited
- Fix share links opening in different Apollo app (#113)
- Fix Pixel Pals making dynamic island taller than expected on newer iPhone models (#111)

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 2.0.0 patched with Liquid Glass support. 🎉 ***Massive*** update that enables Ultra features like saved categories, new app icons and Pixel Pals! This also brings new features like recently read posts and fixes for some longstanding Apollo bugs. The Custom API settings view has also been redesigned and is now accessible directly from Settings. > [!NOTE] > Ultra features that rely on push notifications **still do not work**, and are unlikely to ever be supported. | | | | |:--:|:--:|:--:| | | | | ### Saved Categories - To enable saved categories, set "Allow Saved Categories" in Settings > General > Other - New "Saved Categories" section in Settings tab to edit and delete saved categories - Fixed: Saved category names are now consistently sorted in menus - **Note:** Saved categories are global, while saved items are tied to individual accounts ### Recently Read - New "Recently Read" button in Profile tab to view and clear all recently read posts - "Disable Marking Posts Read" **must be unchecked** in Settings > General > Mark Read / Hiding Posts - **Note:** Recently read is global (not account-specific) ### Media Playback - New "Unmute Videos in Comments" setting (Settings > General > Custom API) - **Default**: Default Apollo behaviour - **Remember from Fullscreen Player**: If you unmute a video in the fullscreen player, it stays unmuted when you navigate into comments - **Always**: Header videos are always automatically unmuted after opening comments - New "Preferred GIF Fallback Format" setting (Settings > General > Custom API) - Choose between GIF or MP4 when Apollo fetches certain animated images from Reddit API - Try setting to "GIF" if you find certain animated images get stuck with loading spinner ### Other Issues Fixed - Interacting with Ultra features and settings no longer causes app to crash - "New Comments Highlightifier" can be toggled normally in Settings > General, and is removed from Custom API settings - Fix multi-image Imgur uploads failing the first time - Fix share links opening in webview on iOS 26 - Fix album image count label placement on newer iPhone models - Fix "Processing img" in self-posts - Liquid Glass: fix clipping when collapsing long comment chains - Add support for YouTube Shorts links - Various video playback fixes and improvements ### Pixel Pals - Pixel Pals are now available on newer iPhone models - Unlock hidden "Artificial Superintelligence" Pixel Pal ### App Icons & Themes - Unlock hidden "Chumbus" theme - Unlock all app icons, including: - Community Icon Pack - SPCA Animals Pack - Ultra Icons -
22 Sekrit Icons (click to expand) - Beans (Black Friday 2022) - Sloth-kun - iJustine / Wrapping Paper - America! - Super America - UK / Hugh Laurie - Yo. Jonathan Here. (TLD Today) - ApolloBook Pro - Wallpapers - ATP - Phil Schiller - Canada D'Eh - Ukraine - Ernest - Sus (Among Us) - Dave2D - MKBHD (Keith) - Peachy (Neon Peach) - Linus Tech Tips - Andru Edwards - Everything Apple Pro (Icons Drop Test) - does not show up in App Icons. To set, go to **Settings > About**, shake device, and input `everythingapplepro`. - Rene Ritchie - Snazzy Labs
> [!NOTE] > Most of the credit goes to GitHub Copilot and Claude Code, which did most of the investigation and code generation. Models used: Claude Opus 4.6, OpenAI GPT-5.3-Codex and GPT-5.4.

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.4.5 patched with Liquid Glass support.

Prevent certain crashes when Reddit API goes down (#105)

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.4.4 patched with Liquid Glass support.

Fix certain GIFs showing up as `Processing img <id>` in comments (#102)

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.4.3 patched with Liquid Glass support.

- Fix inline Giphy GIFs not loading in comments (#99)

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.4.2 patched with Liquid Glass support.

- Update default trending subreddit source to `https://jeffreyca.github.io/subreddits/trending-subriff-blended.txt` ([source](https://github.com/JeffreyCA/subreddits?tab=readme-ov-file#trending-subriff-blendedtxt))
    - Previous source has been discontinued
- Fix certain GIFs playing at 2x speed on 120Hz displays (#97)

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.4.1 patched with Liquid Glass support.

• Fix certain Streamable links not loading in media view (https://github.com/JeffreyCA/Apollo-ImprovedCustomApi/pull/95)

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.4.0 patched with Liquid Glass support.

• Support custom redirect URIs and user agents (in Settings > General > Custom API)
	◦ This should enable certain workarounds for getting new API keys
	◦ Custom redirect URIs require patching the IPA
• Liquid Glass: fix sort options alignment in comment view

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.3.2 patched with Liquid Glass support.

• Fix crashes in Custom API settings on iOS 14

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.3.1 patched with Liquid Glass support.

• Restore long press gesture on account tab to open account switcher
• Fix opaque nav bar background in dark mode
• Fix dark band appearing in nav bar when scrolling
• Fix misaligned tab labels on startup

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.3.0 patched with Liquid Glass support.

• Backup and restore most Apollo and tweak settings (in Settings > General > Custom API)
	◦ Settings are exported as a .zip file with 2 plist files: preferences.plist (most Apollo and tweak settings) and group.plist (filters, theme settings)
	◦ Restoring settings does not restore or affect existing account logins. This means on a clean install, accounts need to be re-added manually. The backup .zip contains an accounts.txt with all account usernames for reference.
• Update Custom API Settings layout

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.2.6 patched with Liquid Glass support.

• Fix video downloads failing on certain v.redd.it videos
	◦ Context: recently, Reddit started using CMAF media format for serving video content, which Apollo does not natively support downloading for.

This version includes the ApolloICA tweak version: 1.2.5 patched with Liquid Glass support.

• Fix occassional crashes when scrolling on iOS 26 with Liquid Glass patch (thanks @dankrichtofen for the original implementation)
	◦ To apply Liquid Glass patch: see instructions or original issue
• Fix crashes when tapping share URL link buttons on iOS 26
	◦ Note that this is not a full fix. Tapping the link button now navigates to a webview on iOS 26. As a workaround, tap the inline text (see this comment).
• Fix debug logging on iOS 26
